income_documentation.full_doc: 1 Yr W-2s or Tax Returns (Full Doc - 12M)
income_documentation.asset_utilization: Max 80% LTV (Full Doc Matrix); Purchase & Rate/Term Only
income_documentation.alt_doc: 12 Months Personal (or) Business Bank Statements; 12 Months 1099 Income; 12 Month Profit & Loss Statement
income_documentation.alt_doc_requirements: Must be S/E for 2 yrs. See Guidelines for details.

overlays.pl_only_with_2mo_bs: Qualify off Alt Doc grids; Max 80% LTV (Purchase); Max 70% LTV (Refinance)
overlays.pl_only_without_bs: Qualify off Alt Doc grids; Max 70% LTV (Purchase); Max 60% LTV (Refinance); Min FICO 720; Max $2.0MM Loan Amt
overlays.investment: No subordinate financing; Prepayment restrictions may apply; FTHB is not eligible

cash_out_rules.cash_out_with_appraised_value: 6 month ownership seasoning; Max 75% LTV; CDA or SSR of 2.5 or less required

expanded_prime.dti_over_50: Primary residence only; Min 700 FICO; Max 80% LTV/CLTV; No FTHB
expanded_prime.subordinate_financing: Max CLTV = Grid Max LTV (Institutional seconds only)

appraisal.lt_80_ltv: Clear Capital AVM or like product
appraisal.gt_80_ltv: Clear Capital CDA, Field Review, or FNMA Collateral Underwriter Review w/ SRR and score of 2.5 or less

expanded_prime.assets: Sourced or seasoned for 30 days; Gift Funds allowed

credit.standard: 3 tradelines reporting for 12+ months or 2 tradelines reporting for 24+ months all with activity in the last 12 months or one mortgage or installment tradeline for 36+ months with 12 months activity
credit.qualifying_fico: Middle score of 3 or lower score when only 2 agency scores provided, of primary wage earner
credit.tradeline_waiver: Waived if primary wage earner credit report reflects scores from all 3 bureaus & qualifying FICO score is 700+

expanded_prime.seller_concessions: Up to 6% towards closing for all occupancies

ineligible_geos.delegated: Primary & Second Home - NY; All Occupancies: HI lava zones 1 & 2; Investor Occupancy: Baltimore City, MD & Philadelphia, PA
ineligible_geos.non_delegated: Primary & Second Home - NY; All Occupancies: HI lava zones 1 & 2; Investor Occupancy: Baltimore, MD & Philadelphia, PA

income_documentation.alt_doc: 12 Months Personal (or) Business Bank Statements; 12 Months 1099 Income; 12 Month Profit & Loss Statement

non_prime.occupancy_notes: Investment - no subordinate financing and no FTHB
non_prime.pl_only: 2 Mo BS required; Min FICO 660; Max LTV 80% (Purchase) / 70% (Refinance)

credit.standard: 3 tradelines reporting for 12+ months or 2 tradelines reporting for 24+ months all with activity in the last 12 months or 1 mortgage or installment tradeline for 36+ months with 12 months activity
credit.qualifying_fico: Middle score if 3 agency scores or lower score when only 2 agency scores provided, of primary wage earner
credit.tradeline_waiver: Waived if primary wage earner credit report reflects scores from all 3 bureaus & qualifying FICO score is 700+

non_prime.seller_concessions: Up to 6% towards closing for all occupancies

ineligible_geos.delegated: Primary & Second Home - NY; All Occupancies: HI lava zones 1 & 2; Investor Occupancy: Baltimore City, MD & Philadelphia, PA
ineligible_geos.non_delegated: Primary & Second Home - NY; All Occupancies: HI lava zones 1 & 2; Investor Occupancy: Baltimore, MD & Philadelphia, PA

property_types.rural: Max 65% LTV / Purchase Only (Long Term Rent only & DSCR > 1.0x)

requirements.restrictions: No First Time Investor / 2+ Unit / Rural / Unique Properties
requirements.refinance: Eligible with documented 12mo history of short term rental income
requirements.purchase_income: AirDNA to be used for monthly rental income. Min 60% Occupancy Rate. Property income for qualifying: 80% of annual revenue divided by 12. Must document ST rental operator experience in last 12 months

0_to_6_months.rate_term: Lesser of Purchase Price + Improvements (or) Appraisal
0_to_6_months.cash_out: Lesser of Purchase Price + Improvements (or) Appraisal

ownership_seasoning.rtl_renovation_cash_out: If purchased & renovated per appraisal w/ SSR of 2.5 and below; can use appraised value under 6 months ownership w/ 5% LTV reduction

dscr.dscr_calculation: DSCR = Gross Rents / PITIA (fully amortizing) or Gross Rents / ITIA (interest only loans)

dscr_lt_1_rules.vacant_unleased: Ineligible for rate/term or cash-out refinances
dscr_lt_1_rules.rural: No Rural Properties; No Rural locations per CFPB Rural/Underserved Designation

lease_gross_income.standard: Lesser of Estimated Market Rent from Form 1007 or monthly rent from existing lease - higher lease rent allowed with 3 months receipt
lease_gross_income.unleased_refi: Max LTV 70% on Refinances; no LTV reduction for Purchase

dscr.first_time_investor: Min DSCR 1.00, Min FICO 700, Long-Term Rental Only

eligible_borrowers.standard: Borrowers with 12-month history of investment property ownership in the most recent 12 months
eligible_borrowers.llc: Domestic LLC required; US Citizen / Perm Resident / Non-Perm / Foreign National guarantors allowed

credit.standard: 3 tradelines reporting for 12+ months or 2 tradelines reporting for 24+ months or one mortgage or installment tradeline for 36+ months
credit.max_late: 0x60 in most recent 12 months from application date
credit.qualifying_fico: Higher middle score when 3 agency scores or lower score when only 2, of all borrowers/guarantors
credit.tradeline_waiver: Waived if credit report reflects scores from all 3 bureaus & qualifying FICO score is 700+

dscr.appraisal: One full appraisal and CDA required; If CDA variance > 10%, second full appraisal required; C5 or C6 condition not acceptable
dscr.ineligible_geos: HI lava zones 1 & 2; Baltimore City, MD & Philadelphia, PA

income_documentation.alt_doc: 12 Months Personal (or) Business Bank Statements; 12 Months 1099 Income; 12 Month Profit & Loss Statement

reserves.note: Minimum 3 months reserves must come from borrowers own funds

property_types.notes: 2-4 Units are ineligible on Second Home transactions

itin.subordinate_financing: Not permitted under the ITIN program
itin.escrow_waivers: Not permitted under the ITIN program
itin.assets: Sourced or seasoned for 30 days; Gift Funds allowed - Minimum 5% Borrower Contribution

credit.standard: 3 tradelines reporting for 12+ months or 2 tradelines reporting for 24+ months or 1 mortgage or installment tradeline for 36+ months with 12 months activity
credit.qualifying_fico: Middle score if 3 agency scores or lower score when only 2, of primary wage earner
credit.tradeline_waiver: Waived if primary wage earner credit report reflects scores from all 3 bureaus & qualifying FICO score is 700+

itin.seller_concessions: Up to 6% towards closing for all occupancies

ineligible_geos.delegated: Primary & Second Home - NY; All Occupancies: HI lava zones 1 & 2; Investor Occupancy: Baltimore City, MD & Philadelphia, PA
ineligible_geos.non_delegated: Primary & Second Home - NY; All Occupancies: HI lava zones 1 & 2; Investor Occupancy: Baltimore, MD & Philadelphia, PA

income_documentation.alt_doc: 12 Month Personal (or) Business Bank Statements; 12 Month 1099 Income

expanded_prime_super_jumbo.valuation: Two appraisals required on all loans; lower of both appraised values used for LTV
expanded_prime_super_jumbo.assets: Sourced or seasoned for 30 days; Gift Funds are not allowed
expanded_prime_super_jumbo.additional_reserves_reo: Two months PITIA per additional financed property based on PITIA of subject property, up to max 36 months

eligible_csa.requirement: Property must be in a CSA with more than 2mm residents as of 2020

dscr_5_to_9_units.dscr_calculation: DSCR = Gross Rents / PITIA (fully amortizing) or Gross Rents / ITIA (interest only loans)

unleased_vacant.vacant_dscr: Use 75% of market rents for DSCR calculation

lease_gross_income.leased: Use lower of estimated market rent or lease agreement
lease_gross_income.note: Copies of any existing leases required on all transactions

eligible_borrowers.standard: 12-month history of investment property ownership in most recent 12 months
eligible_borrowers.entity_borrowers: LLC Borrowers with Personal Guarantor required w/ minimum 25% ownership; Domestic LLCs only

credit.standard: 3 tradelines for 12+ months or 2 tradelines for 24+ months, all with activity in last 12 months
credit.alternate: 1 mortgage or installment tradeline for 36+ months with activity in last 12 months
credit.qualifying_fico: Lower mid score of all borrowers/guarantors

appraisal.required: One full appraisal (FHLMC 71A, FNMA 1050, or similar) and a Commercial BPO
attachments: Sketch or floor plan of units

equity_advantage_heloan.program_name: Equity Advantage (HELOAN Second Mortgage Fixed Rates)

income_documentation.pl_only: Allowed w/ 5% CLTV Reduction; Max 80% CLTV

ownership_seasoning.primary: No seasoning required. If < 6 months, 10% CLTV reduction

equity_advantage_heloan.interest_only: Max CLTV 70%; FICO 700+; Primary only; 1st Lien must be fully amortizing

credit.standard: 3 tradelines for 12+ months or 2 tradelines for 24+ months or 1 tradeline for 36+ months (must be mortgage or installment)
credit.limited_tradelines: Allowed - Primary only; Max CLTV of 75%
credit.qualifying_fico: Mid score of primary wage earner

appraisal.lte_400k: AVM + Property Condition Report OR Full interior appraisal (1004, 1073 or 1025)

equity_advantage_heloan.listed_properties: Properties listed for sale in prior 6 months from application are ineligible
equity_advantage_heloan.state_limitations: TN - max 180 term; TX Cashout on Primary Residence Limited to 80% CLTV

ineligible_states.delegated: Primary & Second Home - NY; All Occupancies: HI lava zones 1 & 2
ineligible_states.non_delegated: Primary & Second Home - NY; All Occupancies: HI lava zones 1 & 2

ownership_seasoning.primary: No seasoning required. If < 6 months, 10% CLTV reduction

equity_advantage_elite.state_limitations: TN - max 180 term; TX Cashout on Primary Residence Limited to 80% CLTV

ineligible_states.delegated: Primary & Second Home - NY; All Occupancies: HI lava zones 1 & 2
ineligible_states.non_delegated: Primary & Second Home - NY; All Occupancies: HI lava zones 1 & 2

equity_advantage_dscr.dscr_calculation: DSCR = Gross Rents / PITIA (fully amortizing). Min DSCR 1.00x
equity_advantage_dscr.lease_gross_income: Lesser of Estimated Market Rent from Form 1007 or monthly rent from existing lease. Lease in place required for all properties. 2+ Unit: Max 1 vacant unit allowed

tql_overlays.note: Overlays PDF uses CID-encoded fonts with limited text extraction. Key overlays identified from partially readable content via PyMuPDF.

pl_only_purchase.tql_overlay: Min FICO per matrix; Tiered by DSCR

investment_overlay.deephaven: No subordinate financing; Prepayment restrictions may apply; FTHB not eligible
investment_overlay.tql_overlay: Per Deephaven; Deephaven reserved right to review all rural designated properties for valuation & acceptability

short_term_rental.tql_overlay: Follow Current Verus Non-Agency Seller Guide; DSCR overlays & categories apply

rural_properties.deephaven: Allowed on some programs with restrictions
rural_properties.tql_overlay: Per matrix acreage limits apply; Deephaven reserves right to review all rural designated properties for valuation & acceptability

cash_out_seasoning.deephaven: Appraised value allowed with 6-month ownership seasoning
cash_out_seasoning.tql_overlay: Use lesser of appraised value or purchase price + documented improvements; Verus Cash-Out Rule applies

first_time_investor.deephaven: Min DSCR 1.00, Min FICO 700, Long-Term Rental Only
first_time_investor.tql_overlay: Must meet Deephaven guideline criteria for applicable program

prepayment_penalty.tql_overlay: No additional state PPP restrictions per Deephaven

caps.tql_overlay: Purchase various options; Refi various options

recent_event_borrowers.tql_overlay: Follow Current Verus Non-Agency Seller Guide

asset_depletion.tql_overlay: Asset depletion combined with DSCR underwrite/qualification not allowed

pl_only.tql_overlay: Must support deposits with documentation; Must support all transaction participants

itin_overlays.bank_statements: Commingled personal & business bank statements are ineligible for qualification purposes

equity_advantage.tql_overlay: Added depletion combined ineligible for DSCR & CES programs

equity_advantage_elite.tql_overlay: No DSCR; Qualifying Underwriter qualification is ineligible for CES programs

general_overlays.fraud_report: All programs require FCS/DI screening per current Verus Non-Agency Seller Guide; TQL requires FCS/DI screening for all transaction participants

lease_income.deephaven: Use lesser of estimated market rent from Form 1007 or monthly rent from existing lease; higher lease rent allowed with 3 months receipt
lease_income.tql_overlay: Lease in place required for all subject properties; 2+ Unit properties: Max 1 vacant unit allowed; Closed loan package must include documentation supporting lease is in place
lease_income.note: TQL follows current Verus DSCR guide

county_investor_occupancy.deephaven: Baltimore City and Philadelphia investor occupancy loans ineligible
county_investor_occupancy.tql_overlay: County level investor occupancy loans are ineligible; Follow current Verus Non-Agency Seller Guide

general_overlays.solar_panels: Presence of solar panels with respect to subject property must meet FHA guidelines
general_overlays.declining_markets: Per Deephaven guidelines; Max LTV reduced by 5%
general_overlays.cash_out_seasoning_all_programs: 6+ months ownership required for cash-out; Use lesser of appraised value or purchase price + documented improvements for < 6 months

dscr.restrictions: Max 65% LTV; Purchase Only; Long Term Rent only; DSCR > 1.0x required

dscr_str.note: No Rural for Short Term Rentals

dscr_program.refinance: Eligible with documented 12mo history of short term rental income
dscr_program.operator_experience: Must document ST rental operator experience in last 12 months

expanded_prime_full_doc_primary.asset_utilization: Max 80% LTV (Full Doc Matrix); Purchase & Rate/Term Only

expanded_prime_full_doc_second_home.uses_same_grid: Same as Primary Full Doc grid

expanded_prime_full_doc_investment.notes: No subordinate financing; Prepayment restrictions may apply; FTHB not eligible

expanded_prime_alt_doc_primary.requirements: 12 Months Personal (or) Business Bank Statements; 12 Months 1099 Income; 12 Month P&L Statement

expanded_prime_alt_doc_second_home.uses_grid: Second Home & Investment Alt Doc grid

expanded_prime_alt_doc_investment.uses_grid: Second Home & Investment Alt Doc grid

non_prime_alt_doc.requirements: 12 Months Personal (or) Business Bank Statements; 12 Months 1099 Income; 12 Month P&L Statement

dscr_standard.requirements: No income documentation required - qualified by DSCR ratio
dscr_standard.dscr_formula: Gross Rents / PITIA (fully amortizing) or Gross Rents / ITIA (IO loans)

dscr_str.requirements: AirDNA for purchase income; 12mo documented STR history for refinance

itin_alt_doc.requirements: 12 Months Personal (or) Business Bank Statements; 12 Months 1099 Income; 12 Month P&L Statement

super_jumbo_alt_doc.requirements: 12 Month Personal (or) Business Bank Statements; 12 Month 1099 Income

heloan_pl_only.requirements: P&L Only with 5% CLTV Reduction; Max 80% CLTV

heloan_dscr.requirements: No income doc - DSCR qualified. Min DSCR 1.00x
